records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Anatomized (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Anatomizing.]

defs: To dissect; to cut in pieces, as an animal vegetable body, for the purpose of displaying or examining the structure and use of the several parts.
To discriminate minutely or carefully; to analyze.
quotes: If we anatomize all other reasonings of this nature, we shall find that they are founded on the relation of cause and effect.
